feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is there a possibility to set default Item Category based on Incoterms entered at Sales Order level?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

The requirement: When creating a sales order that includes incoterms, the item category on the item line should default to YXXX. Also please also let me know if we can do something in the sales contract to avoid enhancement.

As per my research I did not find any blog or answers related to my requirement. Can anyone tell me is this possible? 

Regards,

Vardhan K

#SAP SD SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Bad sequence of luw from EWM to ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

Sometime ECC receive luw in a bad sequence from EWM.

For example we received an IBD modify before its create, So I save the first luw to intergrate the second.

Another example, on IBD we receive the move from ROD to AFS before receipt on ROD. So we buisness made inventory on EWM to add stock on ROD so the queue is unlock and after all luw are integrated on ECC they made a second inventory to delete the stock on ROD.

There is a custo or other to fix it ?

entry.title: GL document journal for ALV report
entry.content:
Dears,

Does anyone know if there is any standard transaction code that can download the GL document journal as an ALV report?

The format should be like this:

I tried the GL line item (FBL3N or FAGLL03), but it only shows the account type with S; 

and some S_ALR reports about the document journal, but there is no ALV format I think.

Is there any idea to get the report as I want?

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Josie

#SAP FI

#GL document journal

entry.title: Pegged requirment issue MD_PEGGING_NODIALOG returned without pegged requirement
entry.content: When call  MD_PEGGING_NODIALOG , it returend not pegged records, attached excel item 17 and 18, how to exclude these records from the pegged requirement?

entry.title: Standard Single Host Installation of SAP ERP 6 EHP8 using Oracle DB 19c on Oracle Linux Host
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

I am building a fresh SAP ECC system using the ERP 6 EHP8 using Oracle DB 19c.

Cloud Environment: AWS EC2 instance type r5.8xlarge (32vCPU and 256GB RAM.

OS : Oracle Linux 8.9 x86_64 (AWS AMI - ami-076b18946a12c27d6)

I have arranged the following disk partitions

[root@sap-ora-demo ~]# lsblk

NAME        MAJ:MIN RM  SIZE RO TYPE MOUNTPOINT

nvme1n1     259:0    0  100G  0 disk /sapmnt

nvme8n1     259:1    0   20G  0 disk

nvme6n1     259:2    0  500G  0 disk /usr/sap/backup

nvme5n1     259:3    0  200G  0 disk /usr/sap

nvme7n1     259:4    0  100G  0 disk

nvme4n1     259:5    0  250G  0 disk [SWAP]

nvme2n1     259:6    0   50G  0 disk

nvme3n1     259:7    0   20G  0 disk

nvme0n1     259:8    0   50G  0 disk

└─nvme0n1p1 259:9    0   50G  0 part /

 

df -hT

Filesystem                                         Type                       Size       Used     Avail     Use%                    Mounted on

devtmpfs                                           devtmpfs            125G     0             125G     0%                         /dev

tmpfs                                                    tmpfs                    125G     0             125G     0%                         /dev/shm

tmpfs                                                    tmpfs                    125G     8.6M     125G     1%                         /run

tmpfs                                                    tmpfs                    125G     0             125G     0%                         /sys/fs/cgroup

/dev/nvme0n1p1                            xfs                          50G       13G       38G       26%                       /

/dev/nvme1n1                                 xfs                          100G    747M    100G   1%                         /sapmnt

/dev/nvme5n1                                 xfs                          200G    1.5G      199G    1%                         /usr/sap

/dev/nvme6n1                                  xfs                          500G    3.6G      497G    1%                         /usr/sap/backup

AWS EFS storage                            nfs4                       8.0E       59G       8.0E       1%                         /usr/sap/trans

Tmpfs                                                   tmpfs                    25G       0             25G       0%                         /run/user/1000

 

I have updated the OS packages and installed the following:

Unzip, nfs-utils, awscliv2, uuidd,

 

Performed prerequisites check using the SWPM (sapinst) for

SAP Business Suite 7i 2016 > EHP8 for SAP ERP 6 ABAP > Oracle >Preparations

Installed the Oracle 19c software remotely by using the mobaxterm utility, ssh session & x11 forwarding.

Further proceeded for installation using the SWPM (sapinst) for

SAP Business Suite 7i 2016 > EHP8 for SAP ERP 6 ABAP > Oracle >Installation> Application Server ABAP>Standard System >Standard System

Installed the Oracle DB exports using patch from

Maintained the same SID as for the DB software.

Almost during the end of “define parameters” phase of SWPM process, I am getting the following message.

 

An error occurred while processing option SAP Business Suite 7i 2016 > EHP8 for SAP ERP 6.0 ABAP > Oracle > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Execution of the command "rsecssfx/rsecssfx generatekey -keyId 20240516_172333_SBX_INSTALLER -getPlainValueToConsole" finished with return code 1. Output: rsecssfx/rsecssfx: /lib64/libstdc++.so.6: version `GLIBCXX_3.4.26' not found (required by rsecssfx/rsecssfx)).

You can now:

Choose Retry

to repeat the current step.

Choose Log Files

to get more information about the error.

Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/BS2016/ERP608/ORA/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

 

Error found in above path : sapinst_dev.log :

ERROR   2024-05-16 18:54:07.884 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [CSiStepExecute.cpp:1105] id=controller.stepExecuted errno=FCO-00011 CSiStepExecute::execute() The step generateKey with step key |NW_ABAP_OneHost|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|NW_Onehost_System|ind|ind|ind|ind|onehost|0|NW_CI_Instance|ind|ind|ind|ind|ci|0|NW_ABAP_SSFS_Custom_Key|ind|ind|ind|ind|customKey|0|generateKey was executed with status ERROR (Last error reported by the step: Execution of the command "rsecssfx/rsecssfx generatekey -keyId 20240516_185407_SBX_INSTALLER -getPlainValueToConsole" finished with return code 1. Output: rsecssfx/rsecssfx: /lib64/libstdc++.so.6: version `GLIBCXX_3.4.26' not found (required by rsecssfx/rsecssfx)).

 

Actions taken.

  1. tried installation of

-rwxrwxrwx 1 root root 68303162 May 16 13:10 compat-sap-c++-10-10.2.1-11.0.3.el8.src.rpm

Got output as:

warning: user mockbuild does not exist - using root.

warning: group mock does not exist - using root.

checked following.

[root@sap-ora-demo ABAP]# bash

[root@sap-ora-demo ABAP]# strings /usr/lib64/libstdc++.so.6 | grep GLIBCXX

GLIBCXX_3.4

GLIBCXX_3.4.1

GLIBCXX_3.4.2

GLIBCXX_3.4.3

GLIBCXX_3.4.4

GLIBCXX_3.4.5

GLIBCXX_3.4.6

GLIBCXX_3.4.7

GLIBCXX_3.4.8

GLIBCXX_3.4.9

GLIBCXX_3.4.10

GLIBCXX_3.4.11

GLIBCXX_3.4.12

GLIBCXX_3.4.13

GLIBCXX_3.4.14

GLIBCXX_3.4.15

GLIBCXX_3.4.16

GLIBCXX_3.4.17

GLIBCXX_3.4.18

GLIBCXX_3.4.19

GLIBCXX_3.4.20

GLIBCXX_3.4.21

GLIBCXX_3.4.22

GLIBCXX_3.4.23

GLIBCXX_3.4.24

GLIBCXX_3.4.25

GLIBCXX_DEBUG_MESSAGE_LENGTH

GA+GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS

 

  1. tried re-run of SWPM with following
  2.  simple master password   , none special character , total 8 character
  3. unchecked “use ABAP SSFS” option in one of the SWPM step.

Still facing same error

entry.title: ZARIXBC3 deletion taking very long -using program RSAINDDL
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to delete the entries from table ZARIXBC3(Change documents). 

Steps: SARJ=> ZCHANGEDOCU => Environment => Fill Structure

Select any file click on delete structure and schedule it as a background job. 

Even if we select a single file, the jobs runs for more than a day and canceled. 

I have tried delete entries for other objects like MM_MATBEL and MM_EKKO and the job is quick. 

Please share the options or solutions to make it quicker.

entry.title: PO item exclusion impossible in MRRL
entry.content:
Hello,

Users invoiced ERS PO item with MIRO. When doing MRRL, this item is also selected as postable item. 

To invoid unneeded invoice item with amount to zero, I wanted to exclude the item in MRRL in test mode, before invoice generation. This what is explained in note "1543167 - Invoice is posted with zero amount in T-code MRRL - SAP ERP & S/4 HANA". But I am not able to exclude the item. 

I think because the item is postable. It is also what the note is saying : Note: for transaction MRRL, in test mode, only the items which cannot be posted, can be selected for "Exclude from ERS". The items for which the invoice can be posted, cannot be selected for "Exclude from ERS" (for messaging purposes). This can be seen on whether flag "ERS Pstable" is marked or not. This indicator is set automatically by the system. 

In this case I don't understand the purpose of the note. SAP provide a resolution to exclude zero amount item but prevents you to do it because these items are postable. Did I miss some thing ? 

Please advice.

Thank you

entry.title: Update new column to paysheet in sap system
entry.content:
Due to changes in paysheet we are required to update the column in SAP too for FICO posting in Hana.

It should be at earning side and Calculation is depended on Days present.

entry.title: Concerns regarding GRID SBP upgrade from 19.16 to 19.20
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are planning existing Grid SBP19.16 to SBP 19.20. and we are following attached readme "README19V2P_PHONE_NUMBER9 2" for the SBP 19.20.
And that Grid is used other for DBs in the same server. So upgrading sbp will lead to downtime for all the four DBs right.

So we have few concerns below,
1. Which backups to be taken before going ahead with the upgrades? (Please mention necessary backups /config backups we should take)
2. Also as a precautionary measures, do we have to take full DB backup of all the four DBs which are connected to GRID and DB GRP also to be taken? Kindly suggest.
3. In case of backout scenario what step to be followed exactly to back to 19.16. If we take any filesystem backup, will it be helpful? And while following the README the 3 number para says, to install the previous sbp. Can you help me on the steps?


Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP ECC EHP7 equivalent MDKP table but for MRP AREA
entry.content:
hello,

MRP AREA is activated in my SAP ECC EHP7. I want to get the list of all last MRP run for my materials but MDKP is no more used ( since MRP activation ).

Do you which table is used for MRP AREA ?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Romeo

entry.title: In Process order how its accepting phase 30 is having more confirmed yield than phase 20.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

While doing Process Order confirmation in COR6n having order Qty 7Kg, the phase 20 has partially confirmed yield Qty 0f 1Kg and for next phase 30 why its allowing to do confirmed yield more than 1Kg as its allowing for 7Kg. I checked confirmation parameter configuration also. For phase 30 actually it should not allow more Qty than the Qty which I confirmed for phase 20. Please let me know if any configuration is missing.

Display COR3

Confirmation Parameter OPK4

Thank you.

PLM Quality Management (QM) SAP Fiori for SAP ERP MAN Production Planning (PP) 

@rupesh_brahmankar3 @Caetano

entry.title: Employee subgroup change after Caution: Wage type model changes on specified date
entry.content:
I have created a new Subgroup and PSgroup, and the user has run the org reassignment. The new subgroup has been updated in PA30 master data.

Now, when I try to enter Info Type 8 (Basic Salary), the system gives me a warning about the wage type model change and then executes the relevant wage types. However, it reverts to the old subgroup at the same time.

Note that the new subgroup has been updated in LGMST, V_503_ALL, V_T510, and V_503_G.

Does anyone have any idea why the wage type model in Info Type 8 is changing back to the old subgroup?

Please note that no error is given, and the salary is saved successfully, but with the old subgroup in Info Type 8.

Thank you for your assistance.

Screenshot of before wagetype warning and after warning subgroup change is attached.

entry.title: Balance Carry forward(FAGLGVTR) runs for several years
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am in a project to Upgrade S4 1511 to S4/han 2023. I executed the FAGLGVTR for 2024, when reviewing the ACDOCA table it was executed from 2018 to 2024, placing initial balances in each year in period 0, but the execution What I did was only in 2024.

entry.title: Change output when "delivery completed" indicator ( ELIKZ) is set in background
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to trigger change output when delivery completed indicator is set/unchecked in background. Can you please suggest how it can be achieved?

We found one SAP NOTE 1987986 which helps in creating the change log but it is unclear if it will work when GR is posted via eWM or via BAPI or API.

Thanks in advance for sharing your feedback.

Best Regards

Rajan

entry.title: Column net price is empty
entry.content:
Dear expert:

         By t-code me31k, Create two service contracts document whose material group in contact item are same. the material group is 007 ( services ).  the different is services master data of service line in document，one service number of contract document is 100225, the other service number of document is 100227.  then, By t-code me51n, Create purchase requisition document with material group 007 ( services ) and service number 100225. Double click "assign source of supply" in source of supply tab, the system show source of list, but I find that the column net price in some document is empty. for example document 4600000106， the net price in some document is not empty. for example document 4600000107.

       Why the column net price in this two document show different behaviors. Is this standard behavior? I think this is problem, could you please check this problem in internet sap system. screen shots is as below.

Thank you

entry.title: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment
entry.content: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment

entry.title: i have to change abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a bigger value
entry.content:
Good morning.
I need to change the value of abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a larger value.
I have tried to do it through transaction RZ11, but I couldn't (attached tests).
The main problem is that odata services stop working and then start working again, but I want to fix this.
Could someone help me to do it because I don't want to make a mistake, thanks!

entry.title: MR11 Errors-Line 1 cancelled but invoice posted so couldn't cancel line - credit note
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

User is unable to clear old intercompany items in MR11. He is getting the following errors. We are ECC 6.0.

Nothing to write off - check against GRIR report
Write off - small difference
No GR
Need copy invoice
Not fully receipted
No GR and PO raised incorrectly
Line 1 cancelled but invoice posted so couldn't cancel line - credit note

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Is it possible to create and Exception with MC/1 for the sum of valuated stock of two warehouses?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to create an Exception in MC.1 with MC/1 Exception Creation, but I need to check as threshold value, the total SUM of two warehouses at the same time.

Let say I have one work center, and two warehouses. The point is to create an exception for the total value sum of the Valuated Stock for both warehouses taking into account the sum of the two warehouses at the same time, instead of each one separatedly.

Example:

 

Valuated stock at Warehouse A = 1000 EUR

Valuated stock at Warehouses B = 1500 EUR

Exception value = A+B > 2000 EUR.

 

Is that possible?

 

Regards.

entry.title: How to Handle VMI on Subcontracted Assemblies
entry.content:
Background:
We are currently transitioning to a Vendor Managed Inventory (VMI) model for a specific motor part that is used in two different higher-level assemblies (BOMs). One BOM will continue to use the motor we purchase directly from the manufacturer A, while the other BOM will use the same motor part number supplied directly to our subcontractor through a VMI program. Critical to note these motors are exactly the same and have the same material master.
Goal:
Our primary goal is to ensure accurate demand planning and avoid over-purchasing the motor we buy directly and send to subcontractor number 1. We need to make sure that the consumption of the VMI motor at the subcontractor number 2 is properly reflected in our SAP system so that it is considered when calculating the overall demand for the motor.
Challenges:

  • The VMI motor and the directly purchased motor share the same material master and part number, making it difficult to distinguish between them in SAP. That material master is used on two BOMs. One BOM is manufactured by subcontractor A and one is manufacturered by subcontractor B.
  • We need to find a way to automatically capture the VMI motor usage at the subcontractor and integrate it into our demand planning process.
    Potential Solutions:
    We are exploring the following solutions within SAP to achieve our goal:
  • Consumption-Based Planning (MRP): We want to leverage MRP to calculate the overall demand for the motor based on the consumption of both BOMs. This requires accurate recording of the VMI motor usage at the subcontractor (e.g., through goods issue transactions).
  • Subcontracting with Component Supplied by Vendor: We are investigating if this functionality can help us automatically track the VMI motor usage. This would involve creating a subcontracting purchase order where the vendor supplies the motor directly to the subcontractor, and the consumption is automatically recorded in SAP.
    Questions for the SAP Community:
  • Has anyone successfully implemented either of these solutions (MRP or Subcontracting) to track VMI motor usage and integrate it into demand planning?
  • Are there any specific configuration steps or best practices we should be aware of when setting up these processes in SAP?
  • Are there any alternative solutions or workarounds within SAP that we should consider?
  • Any insights or advice on potential challenges or pitfalls we might encounter during implementation would be greatly appreciated.
    We are open to any suggestions or recommendations from the SAP community on how to best achieve our goal of accurate demand planning and inventory management for this motor part.
